title: Chapter 49
content:
Chapter 49: Sling

’Don’t do it! Don’t do it... Don’t do it! Just go to your room and get dressed. You don’t have to let him clean you. You don’t have to let him touch you.’

Maria repeated the words over and over in her mind like a desperate prayer.

Her trembling fingers slowly reached for the hem of her dress, clutching the fabric tightly as she prepared to pull it off.

But just as she was about to lift it, she froze and her hands came to a stop.

A sudden wave of hesitation crashed through her mind, causing her entire body to stiffen.

Across from her, Denzel stood with a smug smile tugging at the corner of his lips, watching her every movement. But as she faltered momentarily, his smirk faltered ever so slightly.

Maria slowly raised her head, her wide eyes meeting his.

Denzel’s brows narrowed.

’Huh?What’s going on? Why did she stop?’

He remained where he was, his sharp gaze fixed on her.

He hadn’t pressured her further. He had spoken casually, confidently expecting her to continue.

Yet now she stood completely still.

It was enough to make suspicion rise in his mind.

’Is she starting to come back to her senses? This would be the perfect time to use my skill but, the cooldown hasn’t ended yet.’

His eyes flickered to the side as the system interface appeared before him.

[Cooldown Period: 01 Hour : 11 Minutes : 23 Seconds Remaining]

His jaw tightened.

’Damn it. I don’t have that kind of time, it’s going to go down now’

His gaze immediately returned to Maria.

All of it had happened within only a few fleeting seconds.

Then suddenly, Maria forced a shaky smile onto her face and turned back toward him.

"You know what. I don’t think that’s really necessary."

Her voice was soft, nervous.

"I have another set of clothes in my room. I think I should just go change."

Denzel tilted his head slightly, studying her.

"You really don’t want me to help clean you up?"

His voice was calm, almost teasing.

"It won’t take long."

Maria quickly shook her head.

"Don’t worry, Denzel. I’ll be fine. Let me just get changed. If I need help with anything maybe you could help me with the laundry later."

As she spoke, she carefully stepped to the side, trying to slip past him.

But the moment she moved Denzel’s eyes sharpened.

’No...No, no, no. This bitch is seriously trying to resist me. Haven’t you learned anything, mom? Didn’t our nasty fuck last night teach you that no one gets away from me?’

The instant she came level with him, his arm shot out.

"Sling"

His fingers caught her wrist.

Maria froze instantly.

Her breath hitched.

"Huh? What did you say?"

However, her question had come far too, cause right then

[Ding.]

The sharp chime echoed in Denzel’s mind.

[Skill activation phrase detected. Skill is now in use.]

Maria’s eyes widened and a flicker of realization flashed across her face.

Before she could react Denzel yanked by her arm towards him

Her body collided against his chest.

And without giving her even a second to pull away, he cupped the back of her neck and crashed his lips against hers in a deep, commanding kiss.

The moment their lips met, the resistance in her body faltered.

At that moment, as their lips intertwined, Maria completely surrendered.

It was as though something deep inside her had shifted.

As though every lingering doubt, every fragment of hesitation, had dissolved in an instant.

This time, there was no conflict raging within her, only surrender.

Denzel’s hand moved with smooth certainty, one arm wrapping tightly around the curve of her waist as he pulled her body flush against his, her marvelous breasts squeezing tightly against his chest, exposing the feel of her perky tits against his skin.

His other hand wasted no time.

It came down in a heavy smack against the soft curve of her ass before immediately gripping it in a firm, possessive squeeze.

And right there, as he continued kissing her deeply, his lips pressing hungrily against hers, the system notification suddenly chimed.

[Ding]

[Timer limit reached. Skill has now been deactivated.]

With the skill now deactivated, Maria’s eyes slowly softened, the unnatural haze fading from them as they returned to normal.

However, she didn’t stop.

Her body remained pressed tightly against his, her limbs still tangled with his as she continued melting into him, her body rubbing instinctively against his.

Even though the skill had ended, she made no move to pull away.

Instead, she simply continued kissing him, completely lost in the moment.

His hand continued kneading her ass greedily, his fingers sinking into the yielding softness of her flesh.

’Oh my, these feel like they could burst in my hands. So soft, so full and so damn perfect. The skill is gone and she still isn’t pulling away. What explanation could there possibly be for this, except that she’s falling in love? Hehe!’

A dark satisfaction stirred within him.

’Ah, I love the way she kisses me.’

Her lips moved against his with desperate warmth, soft and yielding, each movement drawing him deeper into the intoxicating heat of the moment.

The warmth of her breath mingled with his.

As the kiss deepened further, his free hand slowly drifted lower, tracing along the curve of her body before settling against her other ass cheek.

Now both of his hands moved over her mountain sized ass cheeks in slow, deliberate motions, caressing and kneading her with fluid intimacy.

And Maria, still lost in the haze of surrender continued giving herself fully to the kiss, offering no resistance as she melted deeper into his embrace.

Until finally, he slowly pulled back.

His breathing came in uneven, shaky breaths as his eyes remained locked onto Maria’s.

A dark satisfaction stirred within him as he watched the deep blush spreading across her full cheeks as she stared helplessly back at him.

And then, he spoke, or rather, he commanded.

"Mum, get down on your knees. I want you to suck my cock right now."

And without even a moment’s hesitation, Maria immediately found herself obeying his commands
